bead.title: ddx home: clear test .ddx joins and wire pre-commit audit
bead.description:
PROBLEM
Even after production packages are migrated, the acceptance grep will keep failing because test files and non-test helpers still use literal `.ddx` joins, and `lefthook.yml` does not yet enforce the audit in pre-commit.

ROOT CAUSE
Representative test/helper hits remain in `cli/cmd/run_test_helpers.go:206`, `cli/cmd/bead_workspace_test.go:18`, `cli/cmd/work_resource_exhausted_test.go:95`, `cli/internal/server/workers_test.go:311`, and many other `_test.go` fixtures. The current `lefthook.yml` pre-commit block has no rule running `rg 'filepath\.Join\([^)]*"\.ddx"' cli/ --type go | grep -v '^cli/internal/ddxroot/'`.

PROPOSED FIX
- Replace remaining test/helper `.ddx` joins with shared helpers/constants so the full-tree audit can go green without changing fixture meaning.
- Add a pre-commit hook command in `lefthook.yml` that runs the exact audit and fails on any remaining hardcoded join outside `cli/internal/ddxroot/`.
- Add a config test that asserts the hook block is present and names the DDx-root audit.

NON-SCOPE
- Production-package migrations owned by sibling decomposition beads.
- Worktree registry CLI behavior.

DEPS
- Depends on the production audit children from this decomposition because the final full-tree grep cannot pass until they land.
bead.acceptance:
1. `TestLefthookPreCommitIncludesDDxRootAudit` passes and asserts `lefthook.yml` wires the DDx-root audit into `pre-commit`.
2. `rg 'filepath\.Join\([^)]*"\.ddx"' cli/ --type go | grep -v '^cli/internal/ddxroot/'` returns zero hits.
3. `lefthook run pre-commit` fails when a staged Go file reintroduces a hardcoded `filepath.Join(..., ".ddx", ...)` outside `cli/internal/ddxroot/`.
4. `cd cli && go test ./cmd/... ./internal/server/...` passes.
5. `lefthook run pre-commit` passes.
